name: Ember Touch
description: Ignite one target at Close range. They take 1 damage at the start of their next turn.

name: Smoke Veil
description: Shroud yourself in thick smoke. You become Obscured until the start of your next turn.

name: Scorched Ground
description: Burn the ground at Near range. Creatures that move through the area take 1 damage and must roll Agility or become Frightened.

name: Wildfire
description: Spread flame across up to 3 Near targets. Each takes 1 damage. The fire persists and each affected creature takes 1 damage at the start of their next turn until they spend an action to extinguish it.

name: Inferno
description: A roaring column of fire erupts at Near range striking all creatures in the area for 2 damage. Requires a charge.

name: Fireball
description: A sphere of flame detonates at Far range dealing 2 damage to all creatures within Near distance of the explosion point. Requires a charge.

name: Conflagration
description: An unstoppable firestorm engulfs the entire encounter area. All enemies take 2 damage and must roll Fate or be reduced to 0 HP immediately. Allies are unharmed. Requires a charge.
